payload.answer: The new statement directly contradicts the existing memory: existing says Sam from Goldman has two children, while new says Sam from Goldman has no children. Do not commit either as current without clarification or evidence of a correction/change.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same described entity: Sam from Goldman.

details: Detected direct conflict between child-count claims.
No durable memory card committed as current.

repair_options: Ask whether the new statement is intended to correct the existing memory.
Ask whether there are two different people named Sam associated with Goldman.
If the new statement is confirmed as a correction, supersede the prior memory rather than keeping both as current.
If both statements may be true at different times, add temporal context to each statement.
